title: The Armies Rush Toward Alubarna
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on the armies rush toward alubarna, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Armies Rush Toward Alubarna. As Luffy is gone and the armies clash, Crocodile’s plan appears to be working exactly as intended. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: And ever since then, crabs all around the world have realized just how bow-legged they were...

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: Ohhh! So that's why they walk sideways!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Army soldier
dialogue.text: And there was another twerp hopping behind him then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just leave him and the others be, Nami...

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: They need something to keep their minds preoccupied so they can calm down.

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: They're no good at maintaining composure... Especially that muscle-head.

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: He's feeling insecure because he's realized the gap between him and a Shichibukai.

dialogue.speaker: Royal Army soldier
dialogue.text: What're you implying, exactly? Out with it!

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: Fine, I'll say it. You're scared that Luffy might lose.

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: The hell did you just call me!? You little... MARIMO-HEAD!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Everyone's on edge because of who we're up against... it's times like these that I, as the vice-captain, have to take charge!

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: He promised he'd meet up with us at Alubarma!

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: Aren't you the one worried the most!?

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: You just stick to worrying about the rebellion, not us!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Army soldier
dialogue.text: ...Sorry for making you worry need- lessly, Vivi.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Well, I can't exactly say anything after that, can I now...

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: Alright then... Off to Alubarma we go!

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: A crab named scissors... Seriously now?

summary: This part develops the armies rush toward alubarna and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
